title: Hut 8 Reports Second Quarter 2024 Results
text: HUT Q2 2024 Earnings Report. Hut 8 Q2 2024 financial results on StockTitan. Revenue of $35.22M missing guidance. EPS beat at $0.02 vs -$0.03 estimate. Net loss of $71.9M due to Bitcoin fair value losses. Bitcoin holdings 9,102 BTC valued $570.5M. Digital asset margins 46%. Operations update and forward guidance.
